name: Psanan
public_visibility_summary: Drow, Duergar, Deep Gnomes, Kuo-Toa, and Derro form the dominant Underdark base; Humans, Tieflings, and Yuan-Ti remain permanent secondary surface-facing and port-facing populations.
setting_use_summary: Use Psanan demographics as the active runtime population reference for play, writing, and locality rendering without overriding canon classification.
